data.description:
## Why
Code review (M1/M4) found the reviewerâ†’prompt migration is half-complete in the API
surface: `load_catalog()` returns `Reviewer` while `get_prompt()` returns `Prompt`, and
`Prompt.is_reviewer` is dual-stored alongside `category`.

## What / Scope
Reduce the dual-type confusion: clarify/narrow `Reviewer` (the selection-metadata view)
vs `Prompt` (the resolved-prompt view), and make `is_reviewer` a derived property of
`category == "review"` rather than independent stored state where feasible.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `is_reviewer` is derived from `category`, not independently mutable state (single source of truth).
- [ ] The Reviewer/Prompt relationship is documented (which is canonical for what); public exports reflect it.
- [ ] No behavior change; existing tests green.
data.title: Reduce Reviewer/Prompt dual-type confusion; make is_reviewer derived
